program.name: Entitlement Seat Stateful
intake.purpose: Look up account entitlements with an in-memory adapter, apply a seat-change policy, and write an audit decision from accumulated state.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"entitlement_lookup","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.account_id","runtime.now"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","adapter_kind":"in_memory_mock","account_id":"string","tier":"string","max_seats":"number","active_contract":"boolean","mocked_at":"ISO timestamp string"},"items_json":["account:<account_id>","tier:<tier>","max_seats:<max_seats>"]},"rules":["Parse input.domain[\"inputs.initial_user_text\"] as JSON.","Use only the in-memory entitlement catalog; do not call a network or external service.","The mock catalog contains account acct-2002 with tier growth, max_seats 75, and active_contract true.","For a known account, echo account_id, tier, max_seats, active_contract, adapter_kind, and mocked_at = runtime.now().","For an unknown account, return adapter_kind in_memory_mock, active_contract false, tier unknown, and max_seats 0 while preserving the requested account_id."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal entitlement_lookup.","adapter_kind must be in_memory_mock in both result_json and StageOutput.adapter_kind.","items_json must be exactly [\"account:<account_id>\", \"tier:<tier>\", \"max_seats:<max_seats>\"] using the lookup result."]}},{"slug":"seat_delta_policy","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.current_seats","inputs.initial_user_text.requested_seats","entitlement_lookup.output.result_json.account_id","entitlement_lookup.output.result_json.max_seats","entitlement_lookup.output.result_json.active_contract"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","account_id":"string","current_seats":"number","requested_seats":"number","seat_delta":"number","approved":"boolean","reason":"string"},"items_json":["approved:<approved>","seat_delta:<seat_delta>"]},"rules":["Parse entitlement_lookup.output.result_json and the original request JSON before applying policy.","seat_delta = requested_seats - current_seats.","approved is true only when active_contract is true and requested_seats is less than or equal to max_seats.","reason is capacity_available when approved is true, inactive_contract when active_contract is false, and entitlement_limit_exceeded otherwise."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal seat_delta_policy.","account_id must be preserved from entitlement_lookup.","items_json must be exactly [\"approved:<approved>\", \"seat_delta:<seat_delta>\"]."]}},{"slug":"audit_decision","domain_spec":{"reads":["seat_delta_policy.output.result_json.account_id","seat_delta_policy.output.result_json.current_seats","seat_delta_policy.output.result_json.requested_seats","seat_delta_policy.output.result_json.approved","seat_delta_policy.output.result_json.reason"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","account_id":"string","audit_action":"string","final_seats":"number","source_reason":"string"},"items_json":["action:<audit_action>","final_seats:<final_seats>"]},"rules":["Parse seat_delta_policy.output.result_json before writing the audit decision.","audit_action is approve_seat_change when approved is true; otherwise audit_action is route_to_success.","final_seats is requested_seats when approved is true; otherwise final_seats is current_seats.","source_reason must equal seat_delta_policy.output.result_json.reason."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal audit_decision.","The audit decision must preserve the policy reason without recomputing entitlement details.","items_json must be exactly [\"action:<audit_action>\", \"final_seats:<final_seats>\"]."]}},{"slug":"complete","is_terminal":true}]
